title.en: Ensure journald service is enabled and active

prose.en: Ensure journald service is enabled and active

description.en: Ensure that the `systemd-journald` service is enabled to allow capturing of logging events.

rationale.en: If the `systemd-journald` service is not enabled to start on boot, the system will not capture logging events.

audit.en:
Run the following commands to unmask and start `systemd-journald.service`

```
# systemctl unmask systemd-journald.service
# systemctl start systemd-journald.service
```

remediation.en:
Run the following commands to unmask and start `systemd-journald.service`

```
# systemctl unmask systemd-journald.service
# systemctl start systemd-journald.service
```

references: NIST SP 800-53 Rev. 5: AU-2, AU-7 AU-12
